image:image.image:title: Lumina PMAG gypsum relief panel — hero detail
image:image.image:caption: Studio Luminant Lumina PMAG cast gypsum relief panel — sculptural architectural surface, hero close-up detail.

image:image.image:title: Ottoman geometric gypsum relief panel — gold accent
image:image.image:caption: Studio Luminant Lumina PMAG custom Ottoman geometric gypsum relief panel — intricate gold-accent detail, bespoke architectural surface manufacturing.

image:image.image:title: Organic cell relief wall cladding — luxury hotel lobby
image:image.image:caption: Studio Luminant Lumina PMAG organic cell gypsum relief panels installed across full-height luxury hotel lobby reception wall — vertically integrated architectural manufacturing.

image:image.image:title: AIAPM — 3D CAD modelling to cast gypsum relief panel
image:image.image:caption: AIAPM — Studio Luminant AI-assisted 3D CAD modelling to cast gypsum relief panel: digital wireframe to physical product.

image:image.image:title: Production process infographic — design to finishing
image:image.image:caption: Studio Luminant high-level production process infographic — design, digital modelling, mold making, casting, finishing.

image:image.image:title: Lumina PMAG organic cell relief wall panel
image:image.image:caption: Studio Luminant Lumina PMAG finished organic cell architectural gypsum relief wall panel — precision vacuum-cast, sub-millimetre surface resolution.

image:image.image:title: Petal geometric relief panels — Luminant Lounge
image:image.image:caption: Studio Luminant petal geometric gypsum relief wall panels — Luminant Lounge luxury hospitality interior installation.

image:image.image:title: Wave-pattern relief wall panels — luxury lounge
image:image.image:caption: Studio Luminant wave-pattern Lumina PMAG architectural relief wall panels in luxury lounge installation.

image:image.image:title: Ottoman heritage gypsum relief tile — Islamic geometric
image:image.image:caption: Studio Luminant Ottoman heritage gypsum relief tile — Islamic geometric pattern, architectural wall art panel.

image:image.image:title: Fluted spherical relief panels — hospitality corridor
image:image.image:caption: Studio Luminant fluted spherical gypsum relief wall panels installed in a luxury hospitality corridor.

image:image.image:title: Petal geometric relief panels — hospitality corridor
image:image.image:caption: Studio Luminant petal geometric relief panels installed in a luxury hospitality corridor.

image:image.image:title: Geometric pinwheel relief wall cladding — lounge
image:image.image:caption: Lumina PUCOMP architectural relief panel — exterior and wet-area rated, complex spatial geometry, luxury lounge installation.

image:image.image:title: Finish sample box — open
image:image.image:caption: Studio Luminant finish sample box — open, showing four surface finish samples.

image:image.image:title: Unified Design System — one relief pattern across surfaces
image:image.image:caption: Studio Luminant Unified Design System — same ornamental relief pattern applied to square wall panel and vertical decorative element, demonstrating one pattern across every surface.
